products.name: Zero-Cost Flipping Playbook
products.subtitle: Start Flipping with $0 Investment
products.description: A complete guide to starting your flipping business with zero upfront cost. Covers sourcing, pricing, listing, negotiation, and scaling.

products.name: eBay Arbitrage Guide
products.subtitle: Source & Resell on eBay for Profit
products.description: Master eBay arbitrage — find undervalued items, list them effectively, and maximize your profit margin every time.

products.name: Flipping Profit Calculator
products.subtitle: Know Your Profit Before You Buy
products.description: Interactive HTML calculator that tells you your exact profit margin before you buy. Includes built-in pricing research and fee calculators.

products.name: 100 Items to Flip Checklist
products.subtitle: Never Run Out of Things to Flip
products.description: 100 proven items that consistently sell for profit. Each item includes estimated buy price, sell price, profit margin, and search tips.

products.name: Flipper Starter Bundle
products.subtitle: All 4 Products • Save 30%
products.description: Get all 4 flipping products in one complete bundle. Start with the Playbook, master eBay with the Arbitrage Guide, calculate profits with the Calculator, and never run out of ideas with the Checklist.
